Localization.Description: An attempt to receive information about the location of DBMS user files is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} received information about the location of DBMS user files on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} made an attempt to receive information about the location of DBMS user files on host {event_src.host}
